description: V4 核心路由引擎。纯基础设施层：routing.toml 加载/热更新 + IRC 长连接 + WebSocket bridge 接入 + Plugin 框架 + WS↔IRC 双向翻译。不含业务语义，所有业务扩展通过 plugin 挂载。进程入口是 __main__._main(),启动顺序: load_routing → PluginRegistry → WSServer → IRCConnection → Router → plugin_loader.load_plugins(config-driven 自动发现+注册，V7 2026-04-22) → wire callbacks → auto-join channels → routing_watcher。

key_classes_functions.name: IRCConnection
key_classes_functions.purpose: IRC 客户端封装：连接管理 + pubmsg/privmsg 发送 + namreply/join/part/quit/nick 事件维护 _members 成员字典。独立 reactor 线程运行。

key_classes_functions.name: IRCConnection.send_sys
key_classes_functions.purpose: 发送 __zchat_sys: 系统消息（委托 zchat_protocol.irc_encoding）。

key_classes_functions.name: IRCConnection.names
key_classes_functions.purpose: 返回 channel 已知成员 nick 集合;供 router NAMES 熔断使用。

key_classes_functions.name: BasePlugin
key_classes_functions.purpose: Plugin 基类,提供所有方法空默认实现。

key_classes_functions.name: PluginRegistry
key_classes_functions.purpose: 维护 plugin 集合 + command→plugin 分派表,启动时命令冲突检测(ValueError 即时失败),broadcast_message/broadcast_event 给所有 plugin。

key_classes_functions.name: Router
key_classes_functions.purpose: 中枢路由:forward_inbound_ws (bridge→IRC)、forward_inbound_irc (IRC→bridges+plugins)、emit_event(三路广播:WS+plugin+IRC sys);命令分派走 PluginRegistry.get_handler。

key_classes_functions.name: Router._route_to_irc
key_classes_functions.purpose: copilot 模式 @ entry_agent 并带熔断(entry 不在 NAMES 则 emit help_requested);takeover 直发不 @。

key_classes_functions.name: Router.emit_event
key_classes_functions.purpose: 统一 event 出口,IRC 路径走 _slim_for_irc 截断长文本(200 bytes)防 RFC 2812 超限。

key_classes_functions.name: _slim_for_irc
key_classes_functions.purpose: Router 内部工具:截断 text/content/message 字段到 200 bytes UTF-8。

key_classes_functions.name: RoutingTable
key_classes_functions.purpose: V6 routing schema 运行时对象:channels{ChannelRoute} + bots{Bot}。entry_agent/external_chat_id/channels_for_bot 查询 API。

key_classes_functions.name: ChannelRoute
key_classes_functions.purpose: 单个 channel 路由:bot + external_chat_id + entry_agent。

key_classes_functions.name: load (routing)
key_classes_functions.purpose: 从 routing.toml 加载 RoutingTable;channel_id lstrip('#') 归一化;文件缺失/解析失败返回空表。

key_classes_functions.name: watch_routing
key_classes_functions.purpose: mtime 轮询(默认 2s)+ reload + IRC JOIN/PART 差异 channel;文件被删时清空路由 + PART 全部;malformed 保留旧表。

key_classes_functions.name: WSServer
key_classes_functions.purpose: WebSocket server:管理 BridgeConnection 注册(instance_id 唯一) + broadcast 给所有 bridge + 入站消息交 on_inbound handler。

key_classes_functions.name: _main (entry)
key_classes_functions.purpose: 进程入口:读 env → 加载 routing → 注册 6 个 plugin(mode/sla/resolve/audit/activation/csat)→ wire callbacks → auto-join → 启 routing watcher。

public_interface: channel_server.__main__.main — 进程入口(setuptools entry: zchat-channel-server)
depends_on: plugins.* (只在 __main__ 导入作 wiring,非核心依赖)
tests: tests/unit/test_router.py — 20+ test: 双向路由/copilot@/takeover 不@/命令分派/熔断/event 截断/__msg 不双编码/IRC 命令分派
tests/unit/test_routing_watcher.py — 5 test: detect new/removed/file deleted/malformed keeps old
evidence_file_lines: src/channel_server/__init__.py:1-4 — 纯路由服务核心文档
src/channel_server/router.py:86-97 — 命令前缀/路由分派
src/channel_server/router.py:136-148 — NAMES 熔断逻辑(entry 不在 emit help_requested)
src/channel_server/plugin.py:67-79 — command 冲突检测 ValueError
red_line_violations: src/channel_server/router.py:70-71 — 注释中提到 'customer bridge/squad bridge' 业务场景示例(注释,非代码;router 本身不感知这些角色),可选择改成通用用词如 'originator bridge/supervisor bridge'
